description_long: This is a rectangular wooden picnic table with integrated benches on either side, designed for communal outdoor seating. The tabletop and benches are constructed from wide, flat wooden planks with visible wood grain and a natural finish. The table is supported by sturdy wooden legs and reinforced with diagonal cross-bracing for stability. The benches are attached directly to the table's frame, ensuring a fixed seating arrangement. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for withstanding outdoor conditions. There is no visible umbrella hole in the center of the tabletop.
description: A robust rectangular wooden picnic table with integrated benches and visible wood grain, supported by sturdy legs and cross-bracing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and one attached bench, with supporting legs and cross-bracing visible underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table and benches, with the slatted plank construction and support structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite bench and the same structural details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the length and slatted design of the table and benches.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by four sturdy wooden legs connected by horizontal beams and reinforced with diagonal cross-braces for added stability.
